name: adjudant
description: Obsidian vault editor and project initializer. One command, /adjudant, with eight verbs (connect, port, sync, check, tidy, ramasse, dream, draw) — each backed by a Python helper that follows the .claude/adjudant breadcrumb automatically. Locked three-tier cleanup model: tidy = surface mechanical (routine), ramasse = deep structural (sparing), dream = content/knowledge/memory refresh (semantic, judgment-heavy — 10-category comparator catalog including unacted decisions, documentation gaps, and dangling scopes revived from the original cabinet dream). Cross-machine portable via vault_name fallback resolution. Enforces vault standards; pairs with hookify and Gemineye.
